name: AxEMU
tagline: Next-gen US EVA suit, qualifying for Artemis III
description: Axiom Space's contracted EVA suit for NASA's Artemis lunar return. Heritage from the EMU but with mobility joints comparable to Apollo's A7LB, a regenerable amine CO₂ scrubber, HD video in the helmet, and dust-resistant joints for lunar surface use. Outer-layer styling by Prada. Currently in qualification testing for Artemis III in the late 2020s.
best_known_for: Next-generation US EVA suit being qualified for the Artemis III lunar landing
